function.message: I couldn't complete the inbox item because the workspace does not canonically identify which bills are related to Badger.
function.rulebook_notes: Inbox items are requests, not canonical truth; cast files are authoritative for identity; if the relevant canonical file does not show the needed fact, ask for clarification instead of guessing; avoid partial edits when the task is not doable.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asks to OCR bills related to Badger, but the canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/badger.md only identifies Badger as a system alias `badger` with relationship `printer`. Searches of 50_finance for those canonical identifiers returned no matches, so the relevant bills cannot be determined from canonical evidence without guessing.
